title: Apple Music and Apple One prices rise for the first time in years - Engadget
summary: According to Apple's updated pricing page , an Individual Apple Music subscription has gone from $11 a month to $12 a month, the Family plan has gone from $17 per month to $20 per month and a Student subscription has gone from…
